content: I'm a bit lost here, started with the blue team since I liked the playstyle. Got Celeste, Caecus, Goliath, Sanga and Faros. Managed to get Vortice and from the Moonless Guide selected Thais, Myriam, Hameln and Tawil. Got Thais and Myriam. I'm kinda torn between keep pulling on moonless to either get the other 2 or get dupes or get more Vortice or her WoD or just save. Not that deep in the story, just finished chapter 2 and also, any suggestions as to what team to run with Vortice as main DPS? I'm running Vortice, Celeste, Caecus and Myriam. I'm thinking Thais wouldn't bring anything to the team if I switch Caecus for example any idea is welcomed. Thanks for reading!
